title: Nexus MemoryFragmentInfo
description: A single memory-fragment row in the list-fragments response. V1.79 exposes keyword and creation-time metadata for read-only SOUL visualization; write-only/internal fragment fields (session_id, creator_id, ttl) remain out of this response.

keywords.description: Optional keyword labels extracted for this fragment, decoded from the `memory_fragments.keywords` JSON array for read-only visualization.

created_at.description: Optional RFC 3339 creation timestamp copied from `memory_fragments.created_at`; used as the temporal-drift axis. Family convention keeps timestamps as plain strings.
